prestazioni: L28E inline-6 engine: Full forged internals with JE 9.5:1 compression pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft for 8,500 RPM reliability. Paired with a T3/T4 hybrid turbocharger (Garrett T3 .63 A/R compressor, T4 .60 A/R turbine) on a custom tubular manifold by JUN Auto, supporting 18 psi of boost with a 38mm external wastegate (HKS SSQV blow-off valve).

Fuel system overhaul: Dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, 850cc Nismo injectors, and a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump feeding a custom fuel rail. ECU reflash via Haltech Elite 2500 standalone with individual cylinder tuning and launch control for drag applications.

Drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken 2.2L limited-slip differential with 4.375:1 gearing, upgraded axles (Nissan Competition 300ZX Turbo axles), and a Tilton twin-disc clutch with 800 ft-lb torque capacity. Transmission swap to a Nissan FS5W71C 5-speed with a Nismo short shifter and brass synchros for durability.
estetica: Widebody conversion using a Rocket Bunny V1 280Z kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber front splitter, and rear diffuser) with custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and OEM-style side markers removed for a seamless look.

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (2-way adjustable dampers, 8kg/mm front springs, 6kg/mm rear springs) with polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension) and custom subframe reinforcement plates by Z Car Depot. Wheel setup: Work Meister S1 3P 16x9.5 +15 front and 16x11 +20 rear, wrapped in Toyo R888R 245/45/16 and 295/40/16 tires.

Interior: Full Recaro SRD bucket seats with Takata 4-point harnesses, Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub, and a custom aluminum gauge pod housing Defi Advance BF gauges (boost, oil pressure, water temp). Rear seats removed and replaced with a custom aluminum storage box for spare turbo parts.
